rationale: Clear, well-organized explainer that answers both how heat pumps work and why homeowners might choose one. The headings and bullet points make it easy to follow, and the examples are concrete enough to be useful. It is slightly wordier and more polished than strictly necessary, but still concise and reader-friendly.
